creator: adeepv@gmail.com
text:
Server with mpd5+ipfw_nat. Randomly reboots

http://193.33.236.1/vpn/info.6.bz2
http://193.33.236.1/vpn/vmcore.6.bz2
http://193.33.236.1/vpn/kernel.old.tar.bz2
